refinement_sections.content: The problem is to evaluate an investment proposal for expanding production capacity by buying new machinery and renovating a facility.
We need to find out the renovation costs and the changes in working capital, which are not provided in the proposal.
We will need to assume a discount rate even though we don't know how it was determined.
We will calculate the Net Present Value (NPV) and Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for the project.
The final report should include a recommendation on whether to proceed with the investment based on NPV, IRR, and other strategic factors.
The findings need to be presented clearly to the senior management team.
